name: eventhub-dbu
description: EventHub DBU — AI-Powered Campus Event Management Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd backend && npm run lint" "cd frontend && npm run lint"

author: EventHub DBU
